title: Data of FDCA enzymatic production including enzyme immobilization
author: Concha Núñez, Darly Carolina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset related to the enzymatic production of FDCA, including enzyme immobilization, process optimization, and determination of the enzyme Tm. Additionally, the evaluation of the reactions under industrially relevant conditions using crude HMF was included. The data include the results of: CBM3-8BxHMFO immobilization; FDCA production using pure and crude HMF; FDCA purification; Melting temperature analysis of CBM3-8BxHMFO
